## Project Overview
This is my personal site built with Hugo. It serves as my online CV,
showcasing my diplomas, skills, courses, personal projects, and hobbies.

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Hugo (Go-based static site generator)
- Theme: PaperMod (github.com/adityatelange/hugo-PaperMod)
- Language: Go templates for layouts, Markdown for content
- Styling: Solarized Dark background override via assets/css/extended/custom.css
- Front matter format: YAML

## My Background
- Name: Tomás
- GitHub: github.com/tom-cor
- Senior backend developer transitioning to full stack
- Strong experience with C#, desktop apps, web services, REST APIs, Azure services
- New to frontend/web design, familiar with backend architecture patterns

## Conventions
- File naming: kebab-case (e.g., `my-project.md`)
- Front matter: YAML format
- Prefer simple, readable solutions over clever/complex ones
- Keep Go templates clean and well-commented

## Goals
- Build a personal site as an online CV
- Showcase diplomas, skills, and courses
- Highlight personal projects and hobbies
- Learn full stack development through this project
